---
title: "Material Timeline"
---

[← Gallery](../gallery.html)

<style>
.ex-mat {
  --tl-color-line:   #C5CAE9;
  --tl-color-dot:    #3F51B5;
  --tl-color-dot-bg: #3F51B5;
  --tl-line-width:   5px;
  --tl-dot-size:     1.875rem;
}

/* Suppress the label — this design shows no dates */
.ex-mat .event::before {
  display: none;
}

/* Light gray card with dramatic bottom shadow */
.ex-mat .event.tl-card {
  --tl-color-card-bg: #f5f5f5;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
}

/* Anchor for the arrow */
.ex-mat .event.tl-card > p:first-child {
  position: relative;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* Arrow on left-side cards pointing right toward center */
.ex-mat.vertical-alt .event:nth-child(odd).tl-card > p:first-child::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  right: calc(-1rem - 14px);
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
  border-top: 10px solid transparent;
  border-bottom: 10px solid transparent;
  border-left: 15px solid #f5f5f5;
}

/* Arrow on right-side cards pointing left toward center */
.ex-mat.vertical-alt .event:nth-child(even).tl-card > p:first-child::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: calc(-1rem - 14px);
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 0;
  height: 0;
  border-top: 10px solid transparent;
  border-bottom: 10px solid transparent;
  border-right: 15px solid #f5f5f5;
}
</style>

::: {.timeline .vertical-alt .tl-dot-center .ex-mat}
::: {.event .tl-card}
**Founding**

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit. Maxime ipsa ratione omnis alias cupiditate saepe atque totam aperiam sed nulla voluptatem recusandae dolor.
:::
::: {.event .tl-card}
**Growth & Expansion**

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit. Maxime ipsa ratione omnis alias cupiditate saepe atque totam aperiam sed nulla voluptatem recusandae dolor.
:::
::: {.event .tl-card}
**Major Achievements**

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit. Maxime ipsa ratione omnis alias cupiditate saepe atque totam aperiam sed nulla voluptatem recusandae dolor.
:::
::: {.event .tl-card}
**Recent Milestones**

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit. Maxime ipsa ratione omnis alias cupiditate saepe atque totam aperiam sed nulla voluptatem recusandae dolor.
:::
:::

`.vertical-alt` with `.tl-dot-center`. The original design shows no dates, so `::before` is suppressed with `display: none`. The thick indigo line and large solid dot use CSS variable overrides. The dramatic shadow (`0 20px 25px -15px`) gives a strong depth effect. Speech-bubble arrows use `p:first-child::after`.

````markdown
<style>
.ex-mat {
  --tl-color-line:   #C5CAE9;
  --tl-color-dot:    #3F51B5;
  --tl-color-dot-bg: #3F51B5;
  --tl-line-width:   5px;
  --tl-dot-size:     1.875rem;
}

.ex-mat .event::before {
  display: none;
}

.ex-mat .event.tl-card {
  --tl-color-card-bg: #f5f5f5;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
}

.ex-mat .event.tl-card > p:first-child {
  position: relative;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.ex-mat.vertical-alt .event:nth-child(odd).tl-card > p:first-child::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  right: calc(-1rem - 14px);
  top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 0; height: 0;
  border-top: 10px solid transparent;
  border-bottom: 10px solid transparent;
  border-left: 15px solid #f5f5f5;
}

.ex-mat.vertical-alt .event:nth-child(even).tl-card > p:first-child::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: calc(-1rem - 14px);
  top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 0; height: 0;
  border-top: 10px solid transparent;
  border-bottom: 10px solid transparent;
  border-right: 15px solid #f5f5f5;
}
</style>

::: {.timeline .vertical-alt .tl-dot-center .ex-mat}
::: {.event .tl-card}
**Founding**

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
:::
::: {.event .tl-card}
**Growth & Expansion**

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
:::
:::
````
